description: The LegacyRadiantScreenWrapper component was used to handle the old ui when the bottom buttons used to be physical. this should never be used in new content ever.

fields.Icon: The icon of the current screen.
fields.ActiveColor: The color of the current screen.
fields.Label: The label text of the current screen.
fields.ScreenEnabled: The enabled status of the current screen.
fields.BaseResolution: The base resolution of the current screen.
fields._screenRoot: The root slot of the current screen.
fields._screenCanvas: The canvas component of the current screen.
fields._modalOverlayManager: The modal overlay manager of the dash this component controls.
fields._button: The button for the current screen.
fields._iconTexture: The icon for the current screen.
fields.ExtraSidePadding: How much to pad the current screen
fields.Background: The background color of the current screen.
fields._initialized: Whether this component is finished setup.
fields.InitializeComponent: A sync delegate to call with an argument of T when this initalizes.
fields.ButtonGenerated: A sync delegate to call with an argument of RadiantDashButton to call when this component's button is generated.
